calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-12-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Defendant/Appellant Earl Delano Martin the moving party.

Attorney Marlon B. Baldomero for the Plaintiff/Respondent Magelin Tolentino the opposing party.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Earl Delano Martin, Defendant/Appellant testifies on his own behalf. The following evidence is submitted:

Attorney Marlon B. Baldomero testifies on behalf of the plaintiff/Respondent, Magelin Tolentino.
Trial brief, not filed, submitted to the COurt.
Exhibit A - Photographs of Property Damage
Exhibit B- Photographs of Intersection (10th St. & Bryant St.)
Exhibit C - Medical Records for Mrs. Magelin Tolentin
Exhibit D - Medical Records for Mrs. Magelin Tolentin
Exhibit E - Petitioner's Hearing Brief

Magelin Tolentino testifies on her own behalf.
Attorney Baldomero examines Appellant Martin.

At the conclusion of the case, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem Michelle Brant, Clerk Julie Rumsey, Not Recorded. (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-10-2019 Judgment Entered
